findings.description: Section s1 consolidates the h2 heading '複数ウィンドウを立ち上げたい場合' together with its two h3 subsections ('別ウィンドウにサブミットする場合のJSPの実装例' and '別ウィンドウから元画面に値を設定する場合のJSPの実装例'). The combined content in s1 is well above 2000 characters (includes multiple code blocks: popupButton JSP, setInputValueToOpener JS function, two more JSP examples, plus the warning). Per V3 rules, when an h2 section has >= 2000 chars of plain text AND h3 subsections exist, the knowledge file should split them into separate sections.
findings.source_evidence: Source has 3 distinct headings under this topic: the main h2 with `------` underline, and two h3s with `======` underline ('別ウィンドウにサブミットする場合のJSPの実装例', '別ウィンドウから元画面に値を設定する場合のJSPの実装例'). Knowledge file merges all into s1.

findings.location: s1 — 別ウィンドウにサブミットする場合のJSPの実装例
findings.description: The JSP comment in the source code example explicitly states that for popupButton, the `name` and `uri` attribute specification follows the same rules as a regular button tag within a form: 「name属性やuri属性の指定は、画面内のフォームをサブミットするbuttonタグと同じ」。This is decision-necessary guidance for developers implementing popupButton (they can rely on their existing knowledge of button tag attribute usage). It is absent from the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: Source JSP code comment: `<%-- 【説明】popupButtonタグを指定する。name属性やuri属性の指定は、画面内のフォームをサブミットするbuttonタグと同じ。 --%>`
